name: HMS Lady Rosemary (FY 253)
events: 18 Dec 1940 HrMs O 9 (Lt. H.A.W. Goossens, RNN) participated in A/S exercises off Tobermory with HMS Marguerite (Lt.Cdr. A.N. Blundell, RNR) and HMS Lady Rosemary (T/Lt. G.H. Oldridge, RNR). (1)
19 Dec 1940 HrMs O 14 (Lt.Cdr. H. Tichelman, RNN) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory with the A/P trawler Duchesse de Brabant and HMS Lady Rosemary (T/Lt. G.H. Oldridge, RNR). (2)

20 May 1941 HMS Sturgeon (Lt.Cdr. D. St. Clair-Ford, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Dartmouth with two ML's and later she also conducted gunnery exercises on a target that was being towed by HMS Lady Rosemary (T/Lt. H. Brown, RNR). (3)
9 Jun 1941 HMS Pandora (Lt.Cdr. J.W. Linton, DSC, RN) conducted exercises off Dartmouth with the A/S trawler HMS Lady Rosemary (T/Lt. H. Brown, RNR). (4)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
